[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 10010101 4
2 00000101 2
3 10111000 4
4 00010101 3
5 01101101 5
6 01011110 5
7 01010111 5

12 21 00000000 a match 0

70 07 00000001 1
